content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dima and Bacteria". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/400/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the initial states of the bacteria.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of days required for all bacteria to die.

solution.approach: Simulate the growth and death of bacteria over time, keeping track of the minimum number of days required for all bacteria to die.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
max_val = max(arr)
print(max_val)
